name: tessa
description: Talk to the InnovFix Tessa portal from Claude — tasks, meetings, notes, KRAs, agile, HR, finance.
long_description: Adds Tessa as a connector inside Claude Desktop. Lets Claude list and act on your Tessa tasks, meetings, action items, dashboard notes, KRAs, daily reports, employees, leave requests, agile squads, and sprint boards. Authenticates with a personal MCP token issued by a Tessa admin (php artisan mcp:mint).

api_token.title: Tessa MCP token
api_token.description: Get this from a Tessa admin (Slack-DM Fida or JP) — they'll run `php artisan mcp:mint <your-email> "<device-name>"` and send back the token. Keep it secret; revoke any time.

base_url.title: Tessa base URL
base_url.description: The Tessa portal URL. Most users should leave this as-is.

tools.name: whoami
tools.description: Return the signed-in Tessa user (id, name, email, role).

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List Tessa tasks; filter by status/assignee/squad/due window.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Fetch a single task by id.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a Tessa task assigned to a teammate.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing Tessa task (status, title, deadline, etc.).

tools.name: save_meeting_note
tools.description: Save (create or replace) a meeting's note for a given week.

tools.name: create_dashboard_note
tools.description: Create a dashboard note (sticky) on your portal.

tools.name: list_daily_reports
tools.description: List daily reports for a user (defaults to you).

tools.name: update_daily_report
tools.description: Set a single daily-report field for a date (e.g. log a KPI value).

tools.name: tessa_request
tools.description: Generic GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE escape hatch for any Tessa API.
